case_title: APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. EVELYN WEST et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL WRITTEN AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, EVELYN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: LOST SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, EVELYN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY SERVED APR-18-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, EVELYN
DECLARATION RE ORIGINAL TEN DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, EVELYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 29 OSCEOLA LANE S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
